signals.raw: Today (April 14):** U.S. has begun **blockading the Strait of Hormuz** and clearing mines, halting Iranian port traffic after talks stalled; Trump signals possible fresh talks in Pakistan "over the next two days" but warns of "quick and brutal" action[3][5][6]. No final agreement or de-escalation confirmed—**risk of renewed conflict** could shift prediction markets on war/escalation odds[3][5].
